title: Sealing module for cables or pipes as well as method and apparatus for providing the same
abstract: It is disclosed a method for the production of a sealing module (1) for a pipe or a cable, the sealing module having a hollow body (10) and a plurality of inner layers (11a -11h) superimposed one to the other provided within said body (10), the layers (11a -11h) being removable one from the other to define the size of the cross-section of a housing (14) extending between two opposite surfaces (S1, S2) of the sealing module to house cables or pipes of different sizes, wherein said plurality of layers (11a -11h) are made of a thermoplastic material, or both said body (10) and said plurality of layers (11a -11h) are made of a thermoplastic material. It is also disclosed an apparatus for the production of a sealing module, and a sealing module made of thermoplastic material.
claims:
Claims 1. A method for the production of a sealing module (1) for a pipe or a cable, the sealing module having a hollow body (10) and a plurality of inner layers (11 a - 11 h) superimposed one to the other, provided within said body (10), the layers (11a - 11 h) being removable one from the other to define the size of the cross-section of a housing (14) extending between two opposite surfaces (S1 , S2) of the sealing module to house cables or pipes of different sizes, wherein said plurality of layers (11a - 11 h) are made of a thermoplastic material or both said body (10) and said plurality of layers (11a - 11 h) are made of a thermoplastic material, the method comprising the steps of: a) providing a core member (12); b) extruding in sequence said plurality of layers (11a - 11h), one above the other, on said core member (12), one or more layers being removable from another layer; c) extruding said body (10) made of thermoplastic material on the external layer (11 h) of said plurality of layers extruded in said step b), or providing said body (10) and constraining it to said external layer (11 h) of said plurality of layers (11 a - 11 h). 2. The method according to claim 1 , wherein one or more layer (11 a - 11 h) is removable by peeling. 3. The method according to claim 1 or 2, wherein said step (a) of providing a core member (12) comprises the step of extruding a core member (12) made of thermoplastic material. 4. The method according to any of the preceding claims, wherein said step (b) of extruding in sequence said plurality of layers (11a - 11 h) comprises the step of cooling at least part of at least the external surface of a first layer, before a second layer is extruded and deposited onto said first layer, preferably in the step of cooling a coolant is provided on at least part of the external surface of a first layer, before a second layer is extruded and deposited onto said first layer. 5. The method according to any of the preceding claims, wherein said step (b) of extruding in sequence said plurality of layers (11 a - 11 h) comprises the step of providing a detaching agent before the thermoplastic material is extruded and/or after the thermoplastic material has been extruded. 6. The method according to any of the preceding claims, comprising the step of removing the core member (12), after said step (c). 7. The method according to any of the preceding claims, comprising the steps of extruding in sequence said plurality of layers (11a - 11h) with a closed section, and extruding said body (10) made of thermoplastic material, or providing said body (10) with a closed section, and further comprising the step of partially cutting, or completely cutting, substantially along the axis of the housing (14), the sealing module (1), preferably into two portions. 8. The method according to any of the preceding claims, comprising the step of setting one or more extrusion parameters to provide the desired adhesion between the layers allowing removal of one or more layers, preferably said parameters being selected from: the extrusion speed, the extrusion temperature, the distance between extrusion dies, or a combination thereof. 9. The method according to any of the preceding claims, further comprising a step of drying the external surface of a first layer, before a second layer is extruded and deposited onto said first layer. 10. An apparatus (100) for the production of a sealing module (1) for a pipe or a cable according to a method of any previous claims, the sealing module having a hollow body (10) and a plurality of inner layers (11a - 1 h) superimposed one to the other provided within said body (10), the layers (11a - 11 h) being removable one from the other to define the size of the cross- section of a housing (14) extending between two opposite surfaces (S1 , S2) of the sealing module to house cables or pipes of different sizes, wherein said plurality of layers (11 a - 11 h) are made of a thermoplastic material or both said body (10) and said plurality of layers (11 a - 11 h) are made of a thermoplastic material, the apparatus comprising: â¢ a plurality of extruding stations (101 - 110), each extruding station (101 - 110) comprising an extrusion die, wherein at least part of the sizes of said extrusion dies (102a, 103a) are different one from the other; â¢ guiding means (120, 121) to direct and/or move the thermoplastic material extruded from the extrusion die (102a, 103a) of an extruding station (101 - 110) to the extrusion die (102a, 103a) of a subsequent extruding station (101 - 110). 11. The apparatus (100) according to claim 10, wherein a source (180) of thermoplastic material is connected via a distribution line (190) to at least two different extruding stations. 12. The apparatus (100) according to claim 10 or 11 , comprising a coolant feeder (150) arranged between two subsequent extruding stations (101 - 110), to feed a coolant to the extruded thermoplastic material. 13. The apparatus (100) according to any of claim 10 to 13, comprising a drier (140) arranged between two subsequent extruding stations (101 - 110), to at least partially dry the coolant on the extruded thermoplastic material. 14. The apparatus (100) according to any of claims 10 to 13, comprising a detaching agent feeder (130) arranged between two subsequent extruding stations (101 - 110), to feed a detaching agent to the extruded thermoplastic material. 15. The apparatus (100) according to claim 14, when depending from claim 11 , wherein the coolant feeder (120) and the detaching agent feeder (130) coincide. 16. The apparatus (100) according to any of claims 10 to 15, wherein at least part of the extrusion dies (102a, 103a) have similar shapes, with size progressively increasing from one extrusion die to the subsequent extrusion die. 17. A sealing module (1 ) for a pipe or a cable, the sealing module having a hollow body (10) and a plurality of inner layers (11a - 11 h) superimposed one to the other provided within said body (10), the layers (11a - 1 h) being removable one from the other to define the size of the cross-section of a housing (14) extending between two opposite surfaces (S1 , S2) of the sealing module to house cables or pipes of different sizes, wherein said plurality of layers (11 a - 11 h) are made of a thermoplastic material or both said body (10) and said plurality of layers (11 a - 11 h) are made of a thermoplastic material. 18. A sealing module (1) according to claim 17, comprising a core member (12), the first layer (11a) of said layers (11a - 11h) being superimposed onto said core member (12). 19. A sealing module (1) according to claim 18, wherein the core member (12) is made of a thermoplastic material. 20. A sealing module (1) according to claim 17 or 18, wherein a detaching agent is interposed between the first layer (11a) of said layers and said core member (12). 21. A sealing module according to any claim 17 to 20, wherein a detaching agent is interposed between said layers (11a - 11h) of the sealing module (1). 22. A sealing module according to any of the preceding claims 17 to 21 , comprising a closed section hollow body (10) at least partially cut, or completely cut, into two portions (1a, 1 b). 23. A method for the production of a sealing module (1) for a pipe or a cable, the sealing module having a hollow body (10) and a plurality of inner layers (11 a - 11 h) superimposed one to the other, provided within said body (10), the layers (11a - 1 h) being removable one from the 

 other to define the size of the cross-section of a housing (14) extending between two opposite surfaces (S1 , S2) of the sealing module to house cables or pipes of different sizes, wherein said plurality of layers (11a - 11 h) is made of a thermoplastic material or both said body (10) and said plurality of layers (11a - 11 h) are made of a thermoplastic material, the method comprising the steps of: (a) providing said body (10) having a cavity (50) to house said plurality of layers (11a - 11h); (b) extruding in sequence said plurality of layers (11a - 11h), one above the other, in said cavity (50) of said body (10), one or more layers being removable from another layer. 24. The method according to claim 23, wherein one or more layer (11a - 11 h) is removable by peeling. 25. The method according to claim 23 or 24, wherein said step (a) of providing said body (10) comprises the step of extruding the body (10) made of thermoplastic material. 26. The method according to any previous claim 23 to 25, wherein the first layer (11a) is permanently constrained to the surface of the cavity (50) of the body (10). 27. The method according to any of the preceding claims 23 - 26, wherein said step (b) of extruding in sequence said plurality of layers (11a - 11h) comprises the step of cooling at least part of at least the external surface of a first layer, before a second layer is extruded and deposited onto said first layer, preferably in the step of cooling a coolant is provided on at least part of the external surface of a first layer, before a second layer is extruded and deposited onto said first layer. 28. The method according to any of the preceding claims 23 - 27, wherein said step (b) of extruding in sequence said plurality of layers (11a - 11 h) comprises the step of providing a detaching agent before the thermoplastic material is extruded and/or after the thermoplastic material has been extruded. 29. The method according to any claims 23 - 28, comprising the steps of extruding in sequence said plurality of layers (11a - 11 h) with a closed section, and providing said body (10) with a closed section, and further comprising the step of partially cutting, or completely cutting, substantially along the axis of the housing (14), the sealing module (1), preferably into two portions. 30. The method according to any of the preceding claims 23 to 29, comprising the step of setting one or more extrusion parameters to provide the desired adhesion between the layers 

 allowing removal of one or more layers, preferably said parameters being selected from: the extrusion speed, the extrusion temperature, the distance between extrusion dies, or a combination thereof. 31. The method according to any of the preceding claims 23 to 30, further comprising a step of drying the external surface of a first layer, before a second layer is extruded and deposited onto said first layer. 32. An apparatus (100) for the production of a sealing module (1) for a pipe or a cable according to a method of any claims 23 to 31 , the sealing module having a hollow body (10) and a plurality of inner layers (11a - 1 h) superimposed one to the other provided within said body (10), the layers (11a - 11 h) being removable one from the other to define the size of the cross- section of a housing (14) extending between two opposite surfaces (S1 , S2) of the sealing module to house cables or pipes of different sizes, wherein said plurality of layers (11 a - 11 h) are made of a thermoplastic material or both said body (10) and said plurality of layers (11a - 11 h) are made of a thermoplastic material, the apparatus comprising: Â· a plurality of extruding stations (101 - 110), each extruding station (101 - 110) comprising an extrusion die, wherein at least part of the sizes of said extrusion dies (102a, 103a) are different one from the other; â¢ guiding means (120, 121) to direct and/or move the thermoplastic material extruded from the extrusion die (102a, 103a) of an extruding station (101 - 110) to the extrusion die (102a, 103a) of a subsequent extruding station (101 - 110). 33. The apparatus (100) according to claim 32, comprising a coolant feeder (150) arranged between two subsequent extruding stations (101 - 110), to feed a coolant to the extruded thermoplastic material. 34. The apparatus (100) according to claim 32 or 33, comprising a drier (140) arranged between two subsequent extruding stations (101 - 110), to at least partially dry the coolant on the extruded thermoplastic material. 35. The apparatus (100) according to any of claims 32 to 34, comprising a detaching agent feeder (130) arranged between two subsequent extruding stations (101 - 110), to feed a detaching agent to the extruded thermoplastic material. 36. The apparatus (100) according to claim 35, when depending from claim 33, wherein the coolant feeder (120) and the detaching agent feeder (130) coincide. 37. The apparatus (100) according to any of claims 32 to 36, wherein at least part of the extrusion dies (102a, 103a) have similar shapes, with size progressively decreasing from one extrusion die to the subsequent extrusion die. 38. A sealing module (1) for a pipe or a cable, the sealing module having a hollow body (10) and a plurality of inner layers (11a - 11 h) superimposed one to the other provided within said body (10), the layers (11a - 1 h) being removable one from the other to define the size of the cross-section of a housing (14) extending between two opposite surfaces (S1 , S2) of the sealing module to house cables or pipes of different sizes, wherein said plurality of layers (11 a - 11 h) are made of a thermoplastic material or both said body (10) and said plurality of layers (11a - 11 h) are made of a thermoplastic material . 39. A sealing module (1) according to claim 38, wherein the first layer (11a) of said layers (11aâ 11h) being arranged in a cavity (50) of said body (10). 40. A sealing module (1) according to claim 38 or 39, comprising a core member (12), preferably made of a thermoplastic material. 41. A sealing module (1) according to claim 40, wherein a detaching agent is interposed between the last layer (11 h) of said layers and said core member (12). 42. A sealing module according to any claim 38 to 41 , wherein a detaching agent is interposed between said layers (11aâ 11h) of the sealing module (1). 43. A sealing module according to any of the preceding claims 38 to 42, comprising a closed section hollow body (10) at least partially cut, or completely cut, into two portions (1a, 1 b). 44. A method for the production of a sealing module (1) for a pipe or a cable, the sealing module having an external hollow body (10) and a plurality of inner layers (11a - 1 h) superimposed one to the other, provided within said body (10), the layers (11a - 11 h) being removable one from the other to define the size of the cross-section of a housing (14) extending between two opposite surfaces (S1 , S2) of the sealing module to house cables or pipes of different sizes, wherein said plurality of layers (11a - 1 h) are made of a thermoplastic material, the method comprising the steps of: (a) simultaneously extruding said plurality of layers (11 a - 11 h) of thermoplastic material, one above the other, one or more layers being removable from another layer; (b) providing said external body (10) on said plurality of layers. 45. A method according to claim 44, wherein in said step (a) said plurality of layers is 

 extruded onto a core member (12). 46. The method according to claim 45, wherein said core member (12) is extruded in said step (a), simultaneously with respect to the extrusion of said layers (11 a - 11 h). 47. The method according to any claim 44 to 46, wherein said layers have a closed hollow section, preferably an annular section. 48. The method according to claim 44 to 47, wherein said external body and said layers have an open hollow section, said layers having preferably a half-annular section. 49. The method according to any preceding claim 44 to 48, wherein in said step (a) said plurality of layers are extruded onto said external body. 50. The method according to any preceding claim 44 to 49, wherein said step (b) is simultaneous to said step (a), so that the external body is extruded simultaneously to said plurality of layers extruded in said step (a). 51. The method according to any preceding claim 44 to 50, comprising the step of providing a detaching agent to the plurality of layers. 52. The method according to any of the preceding claims 44 to 51 , comprising the step of cooling at least part of said layers, during or after said step (b) of extruding said plurality of layers (11a - 11 h). 53. An apparatus (100) for the production of a sealing module (1) for a pipe or a cable according to a method of any claims 44 to 52, the sealing module having a hollow body (10) and a plurality of inner layers (11a - 1 h) superimposed one to the other provided within said body (10), the layers (11a - 11 h) being removable one from the other to define the size of the cross- section of a housing (14) extending between two opposite surfaces (S1 , S2) of the sealing module to house cables or pipes of different sizes, wherein said plurality of layers (11a - 11 h) are made of a thermoplastic material the apparatus comprising: - at least an extruding station (102) comprising a plurality of extrusion holes, said extrusion holes being configured to allow a simultaneous extrusion of said layers; - at least a source (181 , 182, 183) of thermoplastic material to feed said extruding station. 54. The apparatus (100) according to claim 53, wherein a plurality of sources (181 , 182, 183) of thermoplastic material is connected via a distribution line to said at least one extruding station. 55. The apparatus (100) according to claim 53 or 54, wherein said extrusion holes are 

 arranged one above the other. 56. The apparatus (100) according to claim 53 or 54, wherein said extrusion holes are concentric one with respect to the other. 57. The apparatus (100) according to claim any claim 53 to 56, wherein at least part of the extrusion holes have similar shapes, with size progressively increasing. 58. A sealing module (1) for a pipe or a cable, the sealing module having a hollow body (10) and a plurality of inner layers (11a - 11 h) superimposed one to the other provided within said body (10), the layers (11a - 1 h) being removable one from the other to define the size of the cross-section of a housing (14) extending between two opposite surfaces (S1 , S2) of the sealing module to house cables or pipes of different sizes, wherein said plurality of layers (11 a - 11 h) are made of a thermoplastic material. 59. A sealing module (1) according to claim 58, wherein the first layer (11a) of said layers (11a - 11h) being arranged in a cavity (50) of said body (10). 60. A sealing module (1) according to claim 58 or 59, comprising a core member (12), preferably made of a thermoplastic material . 61. A sealing module (1) according to claim 60, wherein a detaching agent is interposed between the last layer (11 h) of said layers and said core member (12). 62. A sealing module according to any claim 58 to 61 , wherein a detaching agent is interposed between said layers (11aâ 11h) of the sealing module (1). 63. A sealing module according to any of the preceding claims 58 to 62, comprising a closed section hollow body (10) at least partially cut, or completely cut, into two portions (1a, 1 b). 64. A method for the production of a sealing module (1) for a pipe or a cable, the sealing module having a hollow body (10) and a plurality of inner layers (11 a - 11 h) superimposed one to the other, provided within said body (10), the layers (11a - 1 h) being removable one from the other to define the size of the cross-section of a housing (14) extending between two opposite surfaces (S1 , S2) of the sealing module to house cables or pipes of different sizes, wherein said plurality of layers (11 a - 11 h) are made of a thermoplastic material or both said body (10) and said plurality of layers (11a - 11 h) are made of a thermoplastic material, the method comprising the step of providing said external body (10) and/or a core member (12), and the step of extruding in sequence, or simultaneously, said plurality of layers (11a - 1 h) of thermoplastic material, one above the other, one or more layers being removable from another layer. 65. The method according to claim 64, characterized according to any claims 1 - 9, 23 - 31 , 44 - 52. 66. An apparatus (100) for the production of a sealing module (1) for a pipe or a cable according to a method of any claims 64 to 65, the sealing module having a hollow body (10) and a plurality of inner layers (11a - 1 h) superimposed one to the other provided within said body (10), the layers (11a - 11 h) being removable one from the other to define the size of the cross- section of a housing (14) extending between two opposite surfaces (S1 , S2) of the sealing module to house cables or pipes of different sizes, wherein said plurality of layers (11 a - 11 h) are made of a thermoplastic material or both said body (10) and said plurality of layers (11 a - 11 h) are made of a thermoplastic material, the apparatus comprising, a plurality of extruding stations (101 - 110), each extruding station (101 - 110) comprising an extrusion die, wherein at least part of the sizes of said extrusion dies (102a, 103a) are different one from the other, or comprising at least an extruding station (102) comprising a plurality of extrusion holes, said extrusion holes being configured to allow a simultaneous extrusion of said layers. 67. The apparatus according to claim 66, characterized according to any claims 10 - 16, 32 - 37, 53 - 57.
